Dependence - full staff performance every time during entire 7-day period
7=Activity occured only once or twice - activity did occur but only once or twice
8=Activity did not occur - activity did not occur or family and/or non-facility staff provided care 100% of the time for that activity over the entire 7-day period discontinued 09/30/2023
